tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Ansem explains why now is the time to be doing your research in crypto

"When a lot of people have a negative perception of crypto is usually when the best opportunities arise, and when you should be doing the most research"

"When people aren't expecting things to do well, that's when the smart people are building, before the marketing happens"

"Once the marketing happens is when the average person finds out. But there are people who've been building these things for years"

"Even with AI people were working at OpenAI for years before ChatGPT had its breakout moment. As an average person you had no idea anyone was solving those problems. The same thing is happening in crypto right now"
tweets.title: Ansem explains why now is the time to be doing your research in crypto

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Intern breaks down the market size for humanoid robots

"If you're automating labor, the TAM is basically the size of the labor market. Global GDP is around $120 trillion, labor market is about half so $60 trillion"

"Take Walmart and Amazon. Each have over a million workers, paid $40–70k a year. Say a humanoid robot replaces that labor, its a one time $50k purchase and you own it. It works indefinitely"

"Labor is an enormous cost to these companies. If they can reduce it they're going to. If they don't, somebody else will"

"A million robots at $50k each is $50 billion in revenue. That's around Anthropic's run rate right now and that's valued near a trillion. And that's just Walmart and Amazon"

"There are billions of labor workers. Elon constantly says there'll be more robots than humans. The market for selling these things quickly gets into the trillions or tens of trillions"
tweets.title: Intern breaks down the market size for humanoid robots

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Intern breaks down the attention economy and the opportunity in robotics

"Crypto monetized attention so directly that people actually got really good at it. There was a real arms race for who could get attention, because it was directly monetized"

"If you could get twice as much attention as the next guy, your project might be worth $500 million more"

"It's shocking to me when I talk to a robotics company about their GTM. If crypto is an 8/10 at capturing attention, these robotics companies are a 1.5/10"

"That creates a huge opportunity if you know how to do it. But we're early, it's not gonna exist forever"
tweets.title: Intern breaks down the attention economy and the opportunity in robotics

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Intern explains why he pivoted his career to robotics

"The market size, the insane demand that's coming, and the fact that only a few companies actually understand it and are building toward it. Valuations weren't crazy at all"

"I started tweeting about it, and Andrew Kang reached out when he saw me ripping tweets about robots being the future. So I initially got involved as an investor in RoboStrategy"

"I kept sending them ideas and at a certain point they were like, you should really just come do this"

"This is career level bet size. My conviction is super high, I think Andrew's the right guy to do it, and the vehicle is a perfect way to express this bet on the future"
tweets.title: Intern explains why he pivoted his career to robotics

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Ansem breaks down the SpaceX IPO

"I actually think SpaceX might be a long on the first day. Elon is really good at getting people to buy into narratives" 

"Only like 4% of the total float is gonna be tradable on day one and Elon owns like 50%. The whole float isn't trading"

"Everyone's gonna try to fade this because the consensus is IPOs don't do well. I think it rips a lot of people"
tweets.title: Ansem breaks down the SpaceX IPO

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Banks explains why we're doing the $10,000 Vibe Code Challenge

"We wanna reward our community. That's the whole idea"

"I'm staring at Twitch right now. I have no idea what Twitter is saying. I don't know what Ansem's chat is saying either. We wanna put it all in one place"

"We could've paid $500 for somebody to build this and it probably exists somewhere already. But we want someone to build one from scratch, we wanna attract talent who's interested in building in AI"

"I'm gonna want to be in contact with all of the best submissions. We're gonna do more stuff like this moving forward. This is the whole point of the show"
tweets.title: Banks explains why we're doing the $10,000 Vibe Code Challenge

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Ansem & Banks on copy trading Trump/Jensen

"Trump's taken this thesis that I'm gonna be publicly bullish on what I'm buying and taken it to the stock market as President. All of his stuff is public. You can see everything he buys"

"He's very transparent about the companies he thinks are important for the United States"

"Jensen does the same thing with all the companies Nvidia has in its wheelhouse. He got on stage at GTC and called Marvell 'the next trillion-dollar company' and it popped like +50%"
tweets.title: Ansem & Banks on copy trading Trump/Jensen

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Erik Voorhees on building for a world where AI agents outnumber people

"The normal app is for humans, but we have a full API where an agent can access any kind of AI resource it would want"

"Our docs page has text in it that is not meant for humans to see, but give it to an agent and it reads instructions meant for it to learn all the resources in Venice"

"Most of our customers in a year or two or three may be agents. There'll be more agents than humans in the not-too-distant future"
tweets.title: Erik Voorhees on building for a world where AI agents outnumber people

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Flood breaks down why he's been bullish on Hyperliquid since day 1

"I was told when I joined crypto that you'd be able to do whatever you want with your money, trade any asset, no KYC, whenever you want"

"It's a fundamental human right for people to be able to transact value"

"Jeff is the most transparent, self-accountable person I've met operating at this level. This is his life's work, his magnum opus. And he's willing to die behind it"

"You can see the spread between the way Hyperliquid operates and everyone else"
tweets.title: Flood breaks down why he's been bullish on Hyperliquid since day 1

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Erik Voorhees explains how you can combine different AI tools to beat any single model

"We're working on a concept called Minds. If you put modules of AI systems together the right way, you can get results better than any single model itself"

"All the labs are focused on their models and beating each other's scores, but if you combine these things in creative interesting ways you get stuff no model can do on its own"

"If no new models came out for five years, the advances in AI would still continue apace because people have not realized how much they can do even with the stuff created two years ago"
tweets.title: Erik Voorhees explains how you can combine different AI tools to beat any single model

tweets.title: Banks and Ansem try the pineapple kool-aid jar with Mike Majlak

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Ansem breaks down how to start investing from zero

"First thing is figure out your profits and your expenses. Whatever's left after you pay everything, that's what you invest with"

"Think of it as three buckets. Your cash bucket for emergencies, low risk. Your long term bucket for 10-year stuff, basic ETFs like SPY and QQQ, plus large successful companies. And your active trading bucket for high risk, high conviction plays"

"People always discount how much compound interest impacts a portfolio. Hit ~10% and keep compounding year over year over a long period, that grows a lot"

"You don't wanna go all in on the risky plays. If you go all in leveraged and lose it, you start from zero and you don't wanna be in that position"
tweets.title: Ansem breaks down how to start investing from zero

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Erik Voorhees explains how Venice's dual token model actually works

"You can stake 100 VVV to get pro access to Venice. We take a bunch of our revenue, buy the token, and burn it"

"We want to take that to its extreme and try to buy every last token we can and burn it all"

"You lock up VVV to mint DIEM. Each DIEM you hold gives you $1/day to use on any AI model you want"

"We built it so AI agents could hold an asset and get marginally free inference"

"It changes the economic calculation. We thought that'd be an interesting design space to explore"
tweets.title: Erik Voorhees explains how Venice's dual token model actually works

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Ansem called the market crash live on last nights show

Banks: "Where do you think Bitcoin is headed"

Ansem: "I don't think 60K is gonna hold. I think you're gonna see a high volume sell off and probably some longs get liquidated."

"If it breaks beneath the range lows, all the long positions with stops under 60K get liquidated and that pulls the rest of the market down."
tweets.title: Ansem called the market crash live on last nights show

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Erik Voorhees reveals he debated SBF right before FTX collapsed

"I expected a rigorous back and forth. He was totally unhinged, and he fell apart pretty quickly under the scrutiny of the principles that matter in crypto"

"Right after the debate, people started piling on. CZ said something to him and Sam snapped back about regulators and jail time and CZ basically said oh yeah? and dumped all the FTT"

"That was the beginning of the collapse and the exposure of the biggest fraud in all of crypto. And now he's in jail"
tweets.title: Erik Voorhees reveals he debated SBF right before FTX collapsed

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Erik Voorhees on the censorship risk he sees coming for AI

"We all remember COVID and the period of people most freaking out about it, everyone went online to research how dangerous it was"

"Even asking certain questions about the vaccines could get you de-platformed"

"Imagine if AI had existed then. You go to ChatGPT and ask about the vaccine, the government 100% would've been telling ChatGPT what it could and couldn't say"
tweets.title: Erik Voorhees on the censorship risk he sees coming for AI

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Erik Voorhees on the AI privacy problem nobody's talking about

"Everything you send to ChatGPT/Claude, they have forever. All the close thoughts you share, your business info, the code you write, they save all of it"

"If the only way to use AI is to hand it to a company that stores it forever, then we have a problem"
tweets.title: Erik Voorhees on the AI privacy problem nobody's talking about

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Ansem's take on Solana's biggest problems and how to fix them

"I think one issue is the tokenomics. They're probably gonna have to lower the inflation."

"They need to compete with Hyperliquid on perps volumes."

"Memecoins can't be the only thing doing well if it's gonna succeed as an L1 long term."
tweets.title: Ansem's take on Solana's biggest problems and how to fix them

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Erik Voorhees reveals he got into crypto in 2011 

"I went to the first Bitcoin meetup ever in 2011 when BTC was $5. Only 50 people were there and that was the entire global Bitcoin community”

"Some wondered if we were too late and some liked to fantasize that maybe someday Bitcoin could hit $100”
tweets.title: Erik Voorhees reveals he got into crypto in 2011

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Ansem breaks down the Saylor situation

"He sold 32 Bitcoin. For $2.5 million... but how much did it actually cost him?"

"He lost $8 billion on a $2 million sale."

"Saylor was like 'We're gonna sell Bitcoin just a little bit to ease people's concerns'... and people were like, 'what the fuck? Why are you selling?' 'Cause he never sells."
tweets.title: Ansem breaks down the Saylor situation

tweets.text:
Ansem on how to beat inflation

“With your discretionary income that you have, you have to be investing”

“It’s really the only way to keep up with inflation and keep up with the lack of wage growth across the board, is to be investing”

“I think that’s why everybody, like Threadguy’s done a great job of talking about this, everybody’s gonna be a trader”

“Everybody’s gonna learn how to trade, everybody’s gonna put their money into markets. It’s really how you secure wealth over generations and how you combat inflation”

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Ansem shares his thesis on near:native 

“So NEAR is focusing on the two areas in crypto that are getting attention, privacy and also AI”

“One of the theses around NEAR is it being a platform for agents to transact on”

“KYC laws make it really difficult for AI agents to transact on traditional rails because all of the banking laws that exist are tailored for humans”

“As we’re rewriting the systems of how we’re gonna transact on a day to day basis, crypto obviously is one of the platforms that’s gonna be able to benefit agents because you won’t need KYC to transact on blockchains”
tweets.title: Ansem shares his thesis on near:native

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Banks explains why the Swatch AP is genius level marketing

“I think it’s a really stupid take to say ‘I’m selling my AP because now the barrier to entry is lower’”

“We’ve seen Off-White x Nike, Louis Vuitton x Supreme, Porsche x Lego… these collabs work”

“Put a Porsche Lego in front of a 12 year old kid and he becomes obsessed with it. The rest of his life he wants the real thing”

“Now there’s a realistic goal for some kid in high school to buy a $1,500 AP. It doesn’t mean sh*t to us cause we’re millionaires and adults but like for him…”

“He’s thinking I’ve gotta work my ass off for the next 10 years so I can buy the real thing”

“I think it’s genius level marketing”
tweets.title: Banks explains why the Swatch AP is genius level marketing

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
TJR reveals how he got into Crypto

“I first learned about crypto when I was a freshman in high school. There was this senior on our football team who gave us the whole ‘Bitcoin’s going to change the world’ pitch”

“He ended up getting a brand new BMW i8 with butterfly doors and the license plate said Bitcoin. Once I saw that, I was like okay… I’m sold”

“From there I pursued crypto pretty hard and that’s what led me into trading. I started trading currencies, I was trading the pound against the yen for a bit and then I would trade gold as well”

Banks: “What gave you the idea to do that?”

TJR: “I literally looked up day trading on YouTube. I was doing that pretty much all throughout high school and then the 2020 bull run is where I made the majority of my money”

“From there I gradually switched over to trading equities and doing futures…”
tweets.title: TJR reveals how he got into Crypto

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Ansem: Zcash is Swiss banking in your pocket

“Instead of having to look at different bank accounts and different places to store your wealth, Zcash allows you to have access to that at any point in time and take it with you anywhere”

“If you have a billion dollars in Bitcoin and send somebody $100, anybody you sent that to now knows you have a billion dollars in Bitcoin”

“If you have a billion dollars in Zcash and send somebody $100, they don’t know how much you have in your actual address”

“That’s the core reason I think Zcash differentiates from Bitcoin”

“In my opinion, Zcash is the second best store of value behind Bitcoin. Right now it trades at around a $7B market cap, so I think it has a lot of room to do well and a lot of room to grow”

“In 2016, Bitcoin was around $200 and now it trades at $80,000. In 2016, Zcash was around the same price it is right now…”
tweets.title: Ansem: Zcash is Swiss banking in your pocket

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Tristan Thompson explains how he invested in Anthropic 

“It was a buddy of mine in Silicon Valley… just going to a couple of these dinners they were doing with the NBA, sitting there talking to these guys and really picking their brains”

“They were telling me about the future of AI and technology… I was like hey man, I like what you’re talking about”

“It was a bunch of SF guys and everyone kept telling me, so I was like alright man, here’s a check. I wanna get in the game”

“From there they just opened up so much for me. I was able to get in early through SPVs and bring in my other buddies to make a bigger check”
tweets.title: Tristan Thompson explains how he invested in Anthropic

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Ansem explains why Coinbase acquiring Hyperliquid’s native stablecoin is bullish

“The entire treasury TVL on Hyperliquid, which is around $5B is now going to be supported by Coinbase and Circle”

“This added an entirely new revenue line to Hyperliquid and also great alignment with Coinbase which is one of the strongest US companies for Crypto”

“People kind of see them as competitors… but this alignment is really crucial”

“This added around $150,000,000 estimated”
tweets.title: Ansem explains why Coinbase acquiring Hyperliquid’s native stablecoin is bullish

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Ansem explains why he’s bullish on $MP

“Right now the US relies on China for a lot of the rare earth metals that we source and they’re important for EVs, magnets and all these electronics”

“We have no real way of getting them except for these very few mining companies… $MP is one of those”
tweets.title: Ansem explains why he’s bullish on $MP

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Ansem shares his thesis on $VVV 

“Venice AI is essentially a private inference platform… you can access all of the top state-of-the-art models, all the best open source models but through Venice, it doesn’t store any of your information”

“They’ve done really well. They have over 2 million users. I think they have 50k daily actives on their app and they’re making money from the subscription”

“One of the cool features of Venice that I thought was interesting is they have a second token that’s called DIEM… if you have 1 DIEM, you get to use $1 of compute per day for that 1 DIEM that you have”

“It’s a really interesting model. I think it’s honestly attracted a lot of people to stake $VVV.  We don’t have a lot of real protocols there in the crypto and AI space that aren’t vapor and are actually doing well”
tweets.title: Ansem shares his thesis on $VVV

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Ansem explains why he sees Zcash as a better trade than Bitcoin right now

“I like Zcash a lot. I think that Zcash is in a really good position for a few different reasons”

“One of the main reasons I think is that Bitcoin currently has an issue with the quantum situation”

“One of the ways that I think Zcash is a good trade right now is it’s quantum resistant, it’s also private” 

“Another issue that Bitcoin has had and does have currently is it’s so institutionalized now”

“One of the core principles of crypto and one of the core principles of a lot of the OG cypherpunks was they wanted money that could not be co-opted by any one nation state or any one party or any one person”

“I think Zcash is very reflective of that in that it hasn’t been institutionalized in that way yet”

“There was nobody who was concerned about Zcash until maybe like last year”

“Past crypto cycles, Zcash was laughed at because it underperformed so aggressively”
tweets.title: Ansem explains why he sees Zcash as a better trade than Bitcoin right now

tweets.author: @MarketBubble
tweets.text:
Ansem explains why you need to learn AI right now

“AI is going to make everybody 10x more efficient at whatever it is that they’re doing”

“If you’re concerned about your job… you need to get up to speed and become an expert at using AI as fast as possible”

“There’s going to be people who choose not to do that and people who do. In a few years, people are going to look at AI the same way as being able to use the internet”

“Obviously someone who knows how to use the internet is a way better candidate than someone who doesn’t, it’s going to be the same with AI”

“Whenever you have these technological breakthroughs happen, you create more jobs that didn’t even exist before. I think AI is going to do that more so than displace people”
tweets.title: Ansem explains why you need to learn AI right now

Mizkif: I’m sitting at close to $20,000,000 but here’s thing… most of that, I would say 70% is made through the stock market, it’s not made through my streams”
tweets.title: Mizkif reveals he’s made close to $20,000,000 with roughly 70% coming from the stock market
